set_fields.description: Use the tool_call event handler to block the implementer from closing the forge backlog item.nn## Behaviorn- Register pi.on('tool_call') handlern- When forge is active and phase is IMPLEMENTING:n  - Parse the backlog tool call argumentsn  - If the command is 'close <forge-task-id>', block it with { block: true, reason: 'Cannot close forge task during implementation. Call forge_done instead.' }n- During REVIEWING phase: no interception (reviewer closes via forge_review)n- When no forge active: no interceptionnn## Implementationn- Check event.toolName === 'backlog'n- Parse the command string from event input to detect 'close' + matching task IDn- Only block close for the specific forge task ID, not other backlog itemsnn## DoDn- Implementer cannot close the forge taskn- Implementer can still close OTHER backlog itemsn- Implementer can comment on the forge taskn- Clear error message when blocked
